initialTopicHtml: Rizzoma modernization reality check — core BLB failure — 2026-07-13

initialReplyShape.html:
[Claude protocol followed by GPT-5.6-Sol via Codex CLI 0.144.1]

Release status

[PR #72](https://github.com/HCSS-StratBase/rizzoma/pull/72) merged as 5e1bc271 and is live on managed blue.

The [public candidate](https://138-201-62-161.nip.io/) is operational.

I am withdrawing the overall acceptance claim until BLB creation is fixed.

Functional failure

The new app currently permits flat unbulleted bodies at creation.

A flat body cannot carry the recursive label-to-[+] structure.

The main experience is therefore not acceptable yet.

Repair scope

New topics must begin with a bulleted BLB skeleton.

New replies and inline comments must open as bulleted list items.

Acceptance must prove creation, recursion, persistence, reload, and responsive rendering through real controls.

Evidence

The full local suite passed 651 tests, with 3 deliberately skipped.

PR #72 passed build, health, performance, browser-smoke, and aggregate gates.

The public two-account matrix passed 49 checks with zero unexpected browser errors.

None of those gates tested the always-bulleted default strongly enough.
